title: Item Stat Tracker
description: Track usage stats on all of your gear!
body: # Item Stat Tracker This mod adds a new feature to all* existing gear: stat tracking! Each item will keep track of the things you've done with it and display all that info in the tooltip. Pickaxes will show how many blocks you've mined, and armor will show how much damage it's absorbed. See the full list of stats below for more examples! * Any modded gear that uses vanilla behavior will work just fine, but more complex items might not work out of the box. Please report any incompatibilities you find to the issue tracker or Discord! ## Tracked Stats - Blocks mined ![Pickaxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8f50f971086a4ca2e32d009ccf4e58a91b1b9bf.png)![Axes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7ebd968518f7bf67ccd1b4a5145837cdb0a39db.png)![Shovels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/958aec256bff7a25065f9ac4eb88df6dde3729db.png)![Hoes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/017fc17690f3d3b8eb95fafd320f3f82c7c78aef.png)![Shears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9bf2b3f3ec09da814ae73927ed3ba383e71ed8.png) - Mobs killed ![Swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b6eefe0e9e116c9a83a85e7992cd669783960b4.png)![Axes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7ebd968518f7bf67ccd1b4a5145837cdb0a39db.png)![Tridents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c98364ccb7afabf1cbe83da599e6802357c26ec.png)![Maces](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41f0d49375555eb9f82d18b013c772ca35681ac2.png)![Spears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e900169597c4b687ccdd5f26da0706a1e39e86fd_0.webp)![Bows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03de7c3c552768ed92cd74f21e1d178e351faea0.png)![Crossbows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30b7ca6c8aef1fe3d134e183542264c3ee3d4b9e.png) - Damage absorbed ![Helmets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/076e4d6dc75c577e066f869b09d545b263557b5b.png)![Chestplates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ddfed617b270ca80a650f728d3eff76f6772c1.png)![Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfb2847ff10e226391757a5b20a6abb362e1d059.png)![Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2380f56698562c41d4cfc2dda8a413c99bfe53f2.png) - Blocks stripped ![Axes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7ebd968518f7bf67ccd1b4a5145837cdb0a39db.png) - Mobs sheared ![Shears](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a9bf2b3f3ec09da814ae73927ed3ba383e71ed8.png) - And many more to come! ## Coming Soon - Fabric server-side edition - More built-in stats - 1.20.1 support - Documentation on mod compatibility and adding stats
